title: Resolve symbolic release identity references safely
outOfScope: Publishing/tagging v0.5.39 or dispatching release workflows.
Changing distribution semantics or allowing HEAD as evidence.
Quick Install and unrelated Work Items.
Separate budget-only Work Item or historical archive rewrite.

sources.reason: Symbolic reference behavior documented by finalizer.

riskAssessment.reason: Preflight must resolve controlled branch references after merge without accepting HEAD or hiding stale identity.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized continuing toward a normal release and requires process defects to be fixed before publication.

preReviewWarnings: Ensure symbolic refs resolve to one concrete source commit.
Reject HEAD and mismatched refs fail-closed.
acceptance: Preflight resolves an allowed symbolic default-branch ref for tagTarget and metadataCommit to the concrete source commit.
HEAD remains rejected as an identity reference.
Tests cover symbolic success, stale/mismatched identity rejection, and existing concrete behavior.
Formatting, budget, AI Finish, archive, PR, merge, and ai-close-work-item complete; no publication occurs in this Work Item.
guidelines: Never treat HEAD as release evidence.
Do not weaken public distribution or rewrite immutable evidence.

intent.problem: The release workflow needs candidate metadata committed before the PR merge, but the merge SHA is unknowable in advance; preflight currently rejects the controlled symbolic refs needed to bind that metadata after merge.
constraints: Only controlled non-HEAD refs may be resolved.
intent.rationale: Resolve symbolic refs at preflight time against the freshly checked-out source so PR-first release metadata can bind one concrete post-merge identity without self-referential commits.

rawUserRequest: 继续，目标是正常发布新版本；发现发布流程障碍时先修复根因，再完成正常发布。

declaredIntent.summary: Make PR-first release identity preflight resolve controlled default-branch references safely without accepting HEAD.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized normal release and root-cause workflow correction.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Medium-risk release identity change requires pre-edit and pre-finish checkpoints.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A controlled default-branch reference resolves to the concrete source identity during preflight.
HEAD is rejected as release identity evidence.
Public distribution remains fail-closed until the provider release exists.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item and restore concrete-only identity validation.
